title: Pinku's Pink GUI Pack - Hotbar Only
description: Changes the hotbar to a cute pastel pink color!
body:
Hii!

This is a Hotbar Only version of my other texture pack "Pinku's Pink GUI Pack".
This version ONLY has the Hotbar and nothing else.

This texture pack ONLY works on Java Edition.

I plan on updating this pack with each new update that comes to the game. If you don't see the version that you were looking for then just message me or leave a comment telling me what version you would like and I'll start working on it as soon as I can.




--------------------------[​Terms of use]--------------------------

You can:
- Use this pack in videos and/or streams.
  - Credit when using it in videos and/or streams is much appreciated.

You can not:
- Claim this pack as your own.
- Modify any textures in this pack.
- Redistribute this pack without my permission.
- Sell this pack for profit.
